tagline: Studio 89 nail salon on N Glendale Avenue.

hero.eyebrow: GLENDALE · N GLENDALE AVE · CLOSED MONDAYS
hero.heading: An edited approach to the chair.
hero.subheading: A small editorial-style nail studio on North Glendale Avenue. Six chairs, two technicians, hand-detailed work, and a service menu kept narrow on purpose. Closed Mondays, open the rest.

about.label: The studio
about.heading: Small floor. Sharp work.
paragraphs: Eighty Nine — Studio 89 to the neighborhood — opened on North Glendale Avenue in 2019. Six chairs, two technicians, and a menu intentionally kept short so every service gets the same attention.
We do classic manicures and pedicures, gel polish, dip powder, and detailed nail art. Sanitized tools, single-use buffers, paraffin treatments for the regulars.
Closed Mondays. Open Tuesday through Saturday ten to eight, Sundays ten to six. Walk-ins welcome but appointments preferred.

services.title: Classic Manicure
services.description: Trim, shape, cuticle work, polish, top coat. The thirty-minute essential, finished with intention.

services.title: Spa Pedicure
services.description: Hot-towel soak, scrub, callus, paraffin, polish. Fifty minutes of pure restoration.

services.title: Gel Manicure
services.description: UV-cured polish that lasts two weeks. Available on classic mani or full sets.

services.title: Full Set · Acrylic
services.description: Sculpted acrylic, your length, your shape. Polish or gel included. Sixty minutes.

services.title: Dip Powder
services.description: Lighter and stronger than acrylic. Two-week wear. Available natural or with polish.

services.title: Nail Art · Per Nail
services.description: Hand-painted detail, gems, foils, French. Add to any service.

reviews.name: Tania M.
reviews.text: Studio 89 is the only nail salon in Glendale I trust with both my regular full sets and special-event work. The detail on the gel art is exactly what I'd expect from a studio in DTLA at half the price.

reviews.name: Rebecca H.
reviews.text: Walked in for a classic manicure on a Tuesday and was out the door in thirty-five minutes with the cleanest finish I've ever had. The chairs are quiet, the floor is small, the focus is real.

reviews.name: Anna K.
reviews.text: Booked Studio 89 for my entire bridal party of seven. They handled all of us inside two hours with perfect color matching and gel art on every set.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Eighty Nine Nail Salon, 1010 N Glendale Ave, Glendale, CA 91206

seo.title: Eighty Nine Nail Salon — Studio 89 on N Glendale Avenue
seo.description: An editorial-style nail studio on North Glendale Avenue, Glendale. Manicures, pedicures, gel, dip, hand-detailed nail art. Closed Mondays.
